const fetchedCurrencies = await relayAPI.getCurrencies({
            chainIds: [batchChain.id],
            defaultList: true,
            limit: 100,
          })
          console.log('Loaded', fetchedCurrencies.length, 'currencies for batch chain')
          setCurrencies(fetchedCurrencies)
